series_metadata.series_description: Records that identify students that are on home instruction due to medical or severe behavioral needs. These records include lesson plans, progress reports, grades and time sheets of the tutor that worked with the student

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 6 years after student graduates or withdraws from district ; Electronic: Retain for 6 years after student graduates or withdraws from district, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
